done_when: POST /api/widgets accepts a JSON body with a non-empty name.
POST /api/widgets returns 201 and a widget object containing id and trimmed name.
POST /api/widgets rejects missing or blank names with 400.
The fixture can be validated with npm test.
in_scope: Minimal Node.js HTTP server using built-in modules.
In-memory widget creation for fixture purposes.
Node test coverage for health, creation, validation, and 404 behavior.
Manual Rubricodex v0.1 taskpack and report artifacts.
out_of_scope: Automated probe runner or matrix lock hashing.
constraints: Use official naming: Rubricodex, rubricodex, and .rubricodex/.
Do not store raw transcripts or unredacted command logs.
Do not create a competing local SSoT document.
risk_flags: The fixture should not imply that v0.1 includes app plugin automation.
